extraction.one_line_summary: CORT Magnus won from an 8-rider breakaway sprint in Carcassonne, controlling from the front with teammate VALGREN taking fourth to secure the stage.
tactical_patterns: CORT Magnus demonstrated breakaway sprint control by leading from first position throughout final kilometer, exploiting superior confidence over IZAGIRRE Ion.
Team Astana deployed dual-rider breakaway tactic with VALGREN Michael providing blocking/positioning support while CORT Magnus conserved energy for sprint finish.
CALMEJANE Lilian as local rider failed to capitalize on home advantage despite reaching final breakaway group, finishing only seventh.

rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: Won leading out own sprint from first position for final kilometer, showing exceptional tactical confidence and power endurance combination.
rider_signals.VALGREN Michael: positive: Sacrificed own sprint finish to secure teammate victory, jumped away from chasers for fourth demonstrating strong breakaway form.
rider_signals.IZAGIRRE Ion: negative: Possessed second-best sprint in 8-rider group but hesitated to initiate final sprint, allowing CORT Magnus to control from front.
rider_signals.CALMEJANE Lilian: negative: Failed to convert local rider advantage into stage win despite making final breakaway selection, finished only seventh.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: Retained yellow jersey on rest day eve with zero time changes in top five, riding defensively with FROOME Chris support.
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: negative: Dropped to 10th overall at 6:54 behind, significant GC position loss before Pyrenees without recovering time in transition stages.
